gallup_top5.definition_zh: 交往能力强的人喜欢人际间的亲密关系。 他们最大的满足是与朋友一道为实现一个目标而共同努力。
gallup_top5.definition_en: People exceptionally talented in the Relator theme enjoy close relationships with others. They find deep satisfaction in working hard with friends to achieve a goal.
gallup_top5.feature_zh: 交往能力强的人享受亲密的人际关系。他们最大的乐趣是与朋友一起合作，共同实现共同目标。
gallup_top5.feature_en: You enjoy close, intimate relationships. Your greatest pleasure comes from working alongside friends toward a shared goal.
gallup_top5.description_zh: 交往主题的你与熟人之间的关系更加紧密。虽然你未必会拒绝结交新朋友，事实上，你可能有其他主题使 你在结交新朋友时感到乐趣无穷。然而，你从与亲密友人的交往中获得巨大的欢乐和力量。你对亲密关系感到 自然而顺其自然。实际上，一旦你结识了某人，你就会有意深化这段关系。你敞开心扉与朋友交心，同时也希 望成为他们的知己。你渴望了解他们的情感、目标、恐惧和梦想；同时，你也希望他们以同样的方式了解你。 你深知这种亲密关系并非没有风险，他人可能会利用你，但你愿意接受这种风险。对你而言，只有真诚的关系 才有价值。而真诚关系的唯一检验方式就是完全信任对方。你愿意与他人分享更多，因为这样你们承担的风险 也更多。而风险越多，你们之间的关爱就越能得到验证。这就是你建立真诚友谊的步骤，而你对此是心甘情愿 的。
gallup_top5.description_en: With the Relator theme, your relationships with familiar people run deeper. Although you may not refuse to make new friends—in fact, you may have other themes that make meeting new people fun—you gain enormous joy and strength from being with close friends. Close relationships feel natural and effortless to you. In fact, once you meet someone, you intentionally deepen the connection. You open your heart to friends and want to be their confidant. You long to understand their emotions, goals, fears, and dreams, and you want them to know yours in the same way. You know such intimacy carries risk; others may take advantage of you, but you are willing to accept that risk. To you, only genuine relationships have value. The only test of a genuine relationship is complete trust. You are willing to share more of yourself because the more risk you both take, the more your care for each other is proven. This is how you build authentic friendships, and you do it willingly.
gallup_top5.application_zh: 愿意与他人分享知识和经验，支持他人的成长和发展。 尊重和接纳他人的不同观点、文化和背景。倡导多样性和包容性，并与不同背景的人合作，增进相互理 解和合作。 重视他人的观点和感受。倾听他人的需求和问题，并展现出真正的关心。 培养良好的社交技巧，学会察言观色，适应不同的人际交往风格，以更好地理解和与他人沟通。 培养解决问题的技巧，处理冲突时保持冷静和客观，寻求妥协和解决方案，有效沟通，寻求共同的利益 和理解。
gallup_top5.application_en:
Be willing to share your knowledge and experience with others to support their growth and development.
Respect and accept others' different viewpoints, cultures, and backgrounds. Advocate for diversity and inclusion, and work with people from diverse backgrounds to increase mutual understanding and cooperation.
Value others' perspectives and feelings. Listen to their needs and problems and show genuine care.
Develop good social skills. Learn to read the room and adapt to different interpersonal styles so you can better understand and communicate with others.
Build problem-solving skills. Stay calm and objective when handling conflict, seek compromise and solutions, communicate effectively, and look for shared interests and understanding.
gallup_top5.blind_spots_zh: · 过于坚持己见和固定的交往模式，不愿意适应和调整自己的行为和观念，影响交往的互动性和流畅度。 · 忽视寻找共同的利益点和共同目标，导致交往关系的表面化和短暂性。 · 不尊重他人的个人空间和隐私，过于侵入性的行为和过问，造成他人的不适和疏离。
gallup_top5.blind_spots_en:
· You may cling too tightly to your own views and fixed ways of relating, resisting adapting or adjusting your behavior and beliefs, which can make interactions less fluid.
· You may neglect to find shared interests and common goals, causing relationships to become superficial and short-lived.
· You may fail to respect others' personal space and privacy, behaving intrusively or asking overly personal questions, which can make others uncomfortable and distant.

gallup_top5.definition_zh: 包容力强的人善于接纳他人。他们关心那些被忽略的人， 并努力让这些人融入集体。
gallup_top5.definition_en: People exceptionally talented in the Includer theme accept others. They show awareness of those who feel left out and make efforts to include them.
gallup_top5.feature_zh: 包容力强的人是慈善家，他们善于接纳他人，关心被忽视的人，并促使他们融入集体。
gallup_top5.feature_en: You are naturally accepting, caring about those who are overlooked and helping them become part of the group.
gallup_top5.description_zh: "广纳众人 "是你的人生信条。你希望将人们吸引到团队中，让他们感到自己是团队的一员。有些人只加入 排他性的小团体，而你则不同，你避免任何排斥的团体。你渴望扩大团队，让尽可能多的人从团队的支持中受 益。你不愿看到任何人被孤立在团体之外，因为孤立的感觉是多么寒冷。你会说： “扩大圈子，让他们加入， 并给予他们温暖。 ”你天生具备包容性，无论是种族、性别、国籍、性格还是信仰，你从不随意评判。评判可 能伤害他人的感情，除非迫不得已，为什么要这样做呢？你之所以对每个人都敞开心扉，并不仅仅是因为你相 信人与人之间有差异，因此应该尊重彼此的差异，而是因为你确信在本质上我们都是相同的。我们都是独特而 重要的。因此，没有人应该被忽视。每个人都有自己的份量，这是我们的基本权利。
gallup_top5.description_en: "Include everyone" is your life's motto. You want to draw people into the team and help them feel like members. While some people join exclusive cliques, you avoid any group that excludes others. You want to expand the team so that as many people as possible benefit from its support. You hate to see anyone isolated from the group, because loneliness is a cold feeling. You would say, "Widen the circle, invite them in, and give them warmth." You are naturally inclusive. Whether race, gender, nationality, personality, or belief, you do not judge casually. Judgment can hurt others' feelings, so why do it unless absolutely necessary? You open your heart to everyone not only because you believe people are different and should respect those differences, but because you are convinced that at our core we are the same. We are all unique and important. Therefore, no one should be overlooked. Everyone matters, and that is our fundamental right.
gallup_top5.application_zh: 展现对不同背景、观点和经验的尊重和欣赏。认识到每个人都有独特的贡献和价值，倾听并接纳不同意 见和观点。 主动提供支持和帮助他人的机会，展现关心和同理心。愿意倾听他人的需求，并努力为他人提供支持和 协助。 鼓励积极的沟通和反馈，提供安全和开放的环境，让每个人都能表达意见和感受。确保沟通渠道畅通， 包括定期会议、团队讨论和个人反馈。 加强自我意识，了解自己的偏好和偏见，积极反思和调整自己的行为，加强与他人的情感连接和共情能 力。
gallup_top5.application_en:
Show respect and appreciation for different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. Recognize that everyone has unique contributions and value, and listen to and accept differing opinions and views.
Actively offer opportunities to support and help others, showing care and empathy. Be willing to listen to others' needs and do your best to provide support and assistance.
Encourage positive communication and feedback by providing a safe and open environment where everyone can express opinions and feelings. Make sure communication channels stay open, including regular meetings, team discussions, and personal feedback.
Strengthen self-awareness by understanding your own preferences and biases, reflecting actively, and adjusting your behavior to build stronger emotional connections and empathy with others.
gallup_top5.blind_spots_zh: · 对于不同文化背景、价值观和行为规范的认知不足，缺乏对多元文化的尊重和理解。 · 与同质化的社交圈子保持较高的亲密度，缺乏与多样化背景的人交流和接触的机会。 · 身处不支持包容和多样性的环境，如歧视性言论和行为较多的地方，会对包容主题产生负面影响。
gallup_top5.blind_spots_en:
· You may lack knowledge of different cultural backgrounds, values, and behavioral norms, leading to insufficient respect and understanding of diversity.
· You may stay closely connected to a homogeneous social circle and miss opportunities to interact with people from diverse backgrounds.
· Being in an environment that does not support inclusion and diversity, such as one with frequent discriminatory words or actions, can weaken your Includer theme.

gallup_top5.definition_zh: “和谐”才干主题突出的人渴求协调一致。 他们避免冲突，寻求共识。
gallup_top5.definition_en: People exceptionally talented in the Harmony theme look for consensus. They don't enjoy conflict; rather, they seek areas of agreement.
gallup_top5.feature_zh: 和谐主题突出的人追求协调与共识，像和平天使一样化解冲突、营造和谐。
gallup_top5.feature_en: You pursue coordination and consensus, resolving conflict and creating harmony like a peacemaker.
gallup_top5.description_zh: 你追求共识。你认为冲突和摩擦是有害的，所以你努力将其降至最低。当你发现周围的人意见不一致时， 你力求达成共同点，同时尊重彼此的差异。和谐是你的核心价值观。尽管有人总是试图强加自己的观点，你对 此感到难以置信。你相信如果我们避免固执己见，而是寻求共识和支持，将会带来更大的效益。你坚信这一 点，并且以此原则对待他人和处理事务。当别人强调他们的目标、权益和信仰时，你选择保持沉默。当别人朝 着某个方向前进时，为了维持和谐，你愿意调整自己的目标以与他们保持一致（前提是基本价值相符）。当别 人对他们钟爱的理论或方法大谈特谈时，你避免争论，更愿意讨论可能建立共识的实际问题。在你看来，我们 都在同一艘船上，必须团结合作。这艘船是好船，没有必要为了显示实力而使它晃动不安。
gallup_top5.description_en: You seek consensus. You see conflict and friction as harmful, so you work to minimize them. When you find people around you disagreeing, you strive to find common ground while respecting differences. Harmony is one of your core values. You find it hard to believe when some people insist on imposing their views. You believe that if we avoid stubbornly holding to our own positions and instead seek consensus and support, we will achieve greater results. You hold this belief firmly and apply it in how you treat others and handle matters. When others emphasize their goals, interests, and beliefs, you choose to remain silent. When others move in a certain direction, you are willing to adjust your own goals to align with them, as long as fundamental values are not compromised. When others passionately defend their favorite theories or methods, you avoid argument and prefer to discuss practical matters on which consensus can be built. In your view, we are all in the same boat and must work together. It is a good boat; there is no need to rock it just to show strength.
gallup_top5.application_zh: 确保与周围人之间有开放、透明和及时的沟通渠道，避免信息不对称和误解，增强合作和和谐。 重视他人的观点和感受，积极倾听他人的想法和建议，展示出真诚的关怀和关心。 鼓励团队成员之间的合作和协作，强调团队的共同目标和利益，共同努力解决问题和实现目标。 处理冲突时采取积极的方法，鼓励开放的对话和理解，寻求妥协和共赢的解决方案，以维护和谐的关 系。
gallup_top5.application_en:
Make sure open, transparent, and timely communication channels exist with the people around you. Avoid information gaps and misunderstandings, and strengthen cooperation and harmony.
Value others' perspectives and feelings. Listen actively to their ideas and suggestions and show sincere care and concern.
Encourage teamwork and collaboration among team members, emphasizing shared goals and interests so everyone works together to solve problems and achieve objectives.
Approach conflict constructively by encouraging open dialogue and understanding, seeking compromise and win-win solutions, and preserving harmonious relationships.
gallup_top5.blind_spots_zh: · 合理的冲突可以带来创新和改进，过度追求和谐可能忽视了冲突的积极作用。 · 可能导致忽视个人的需求和边界，无法有效地满足自己的利益和利益。 · 压抑自己的情绪和需求，可能使得问题无法得到解决和满足。
gallup_top5.blind_spots_en:
· Healthy conflict can drive innovation and improvement; pursuing harmony too strongly may overlook the positive role of conflict.
· It may lead you to neglect your own needs and boundaries, making it hard to protect your own interests.
· Suppressing your own emotions and needs may prevent problems from being resolved and needs from being met.

gallup_top5.definition_zh: “关联”才干主题突出的人深信世间万物都彼此关联。 他们相信，世间没有巧合，凡事必有成因。
gallup_top5.definition_en: People exceptionally talented in the Connectedness theme have faith in the links among all things. They believe there are few coincidences and that almost every event has meaning.
gallup_top5.feature_zh: 关联主题突出的人坚信世界万物相互关联，认为一切都有其成因和联系。
gallup_top5.feature_en: You believe that everything in the world is connected and that every event has its cause and purpose.
gallup_top5.description_zh: 凡事必有原因，你坚信这一点。你之所以坚信，是因为你深信我们之间存在着相互联系。虽然我们各自有 着不同的个性和判断力，并保持自由选择，但我们仍然是整个宏观世界的一部分。有人称之为集体的下意识， 有人称之为灵性或生命之能。无论用何种语言来表达，只要你意识到我们与地球及其生命不是孤立的，你就会 增加信心。这种相互关联包含着一些责任。作为宏观世界的一部分，我们绝不能伤害他人，因为伤害他人就是 伤害自己。我们不能剥削他人，因为剥削他人就是剥削自己。我们不能使他人受苦，因为这样做会使我们自己 受苦。你对这些责任的意识构成了你的价值体系。你以体贴、关心和宽容的态度对待他人。由于坚信人类的共 同体，你成为不同文化之间沟通的桥梁。仿佛有一只看不见的手指引着你，帮助你超越日常琐事，看到更崇高 的目标。你具体的信仰可能取决于你的人生经历和文化，但你对这种信仰坚定不移。它使你和你的朋友在面对 人生之谜时坚持不懈。
gallup_top5.description_en: Everything happens for a reason, and you firmly believe this. You believe it because you sense that we are all connected. Although we each have our own personalities, judgments, and freedom to choose, we are still part of a greater whole. Some call it the collective unconscious, others call it spirit or life force. Whatever language you use, when you realize that we are not isolated from the earth and its life, your confidence grows. This connectedness carries responsibility. As part of the greater whole, we must not harm others, because harming others harms ourselves. We cannot exploit others, because exploiting others exploits ourselves. We cannot make others suffer, because doing so makes us suffer. Your awareness of these responsibilities forms your value system. You treat others with consideration, care, and tolerance. Because you believe in the human community, you become a bridge between different cultures. It is as if an unseen hand guides you, helping you look beyond daily trivialities and see a higher purpose. The specifics of your beliefs may depend on your life experiences and culture, but your commitment to them is unwavering. It sustains you and your friends as you persist through life's mysteries.
gallup_top5.application_zh: 努力理解他人的需求、意见和观点，并尝试找到共同利益和解决方案。 与不同部门和团队的人合作，促进跨部门的合作、协调和促进信息共享，保证项目的顺利进行。 积极参与行业内的网络活动和社交场合。与同行、专家和领导者建立联系，通过交流和分享经验来扩大 影响力和资源。 与他人分享自己的知识、经验和资源，帮助他人提升技能和知识水平。
gallup_top5.application_en:
Strive to understand others' needs, opinions, and perspectives, and look for shared interests and solutions.
Work with people across departments and teams to promote collaboration, coordination, and information sharing so projects run smoothly.
Actively participate in networks and social events. Connect with peers, experts, and leaders to expand your influence and resources through exchange and shared experience.
Share your knowledge, experience, and resources with others to help them grow their skills and understanding.
gallup_top5.blind_spots_zh: · 追求关联而忽视事实和逻辑的支持。将不相关的事物强行关联起来，导致关联的无效性和误导性。 · 忽视潜在的相关性，而未能发现事物之间的关联。这种遗漏可能导致对问题的理解不完整，无法获得全面的 洞察。 · 关联主题往往涉及多个因素和变量，可能过于关注某些因素，而忽视了其他重要的因素。这种偏重可能导致 对问题的解释和预测的不准确性。
gallup_top5.blind_spots_en:
· You may pursue connections while neglecting factual and logical support, forcing unrelated things together and producing invalid or misleading links.
· You may overlook potential connections and miss relationships between things, leading to incomplete understanding and less comprehensive insight.
· Connectedness often involves many factors and variables; you may focus too much on certain factors while ignoring others, reducing the accuracy of your explanations and predictions.

gallup_top5.definition_zh: 积极的人浑身充满了富有感染力的热情。 他们乐观向上，并能感召周围的人。
gallup_top5.definition_en: People exceptionally talented in the Positivity theme have an enthusiasm that is contagious. They are upbeat and can get others excited about what they are going to do.
gallup_top5.feature_zh: 积极的人散发着富有感染力的热情，以快乐和积极向上的态度激励周围的人。
gallup_top5.feature_en: You radiate contagious enthusiasm, inspiring those around you with joy and a positive, forward-looking attitude.
gallup_top5.description_zh: 你慷慨赞美他人，笑容满面，善于抓住幽默时机。有人说你毫无忧虑。还有人希望能像你一样乐观豁达。 总之，人们喜欢和你在一起。有了你，他们的世界变得更美好，因为你的热情充满感染力。缺少了你的活力和 乐观，有些人感到他们的世界变得重复和乏味，甚至充满压力。你似乎总能给他们的心灵注入活力。你为每个 项目注入欢乐，庆祝每一项成就。你尽力让每件事都充满生机和激情。由于你充满精力，某些玩世不恭的人可 能排斥你，但你的积极态度很少让你失望。你内心深信生活美好无比，工作充满乐趣。无论遇到什么挫折，你 都不会失去幽默感。
gallup_top5.description_en: You praise others generously, smile easily, and have a gift for timing humor well. Some say you have no worries. Others wish they could be as optimistic and open-minded as you. In short, people enjoy being around you. With you, their world becomes brighter because your energy is infectious. Without your vitality and optimism, some people feel their world becomes repetitive, dull, and even stressful. You always seem to breathe new life into their hearts. You bring joy to every project and celebrate every achievement. You try to make everything feel alive and exciting. Because you are so full of energy, some cynical people may push you away, but your positive attitude rarely lets you down. Deep down you believe life is wonderful and work is fun. No matter what setbacks you face, you never lose your sense of humor.
gallup_top5.application_zh: 关注自己内心的对话，并将其转化为积极的、励志的声音。培养自信和自尊，相信自己的能力和潜力。 以积极的心态对待工作中的挑战和困难。寻找解决问题的方法和机会，抱有成长的心态，相信自己能够 克服困难并取得成功。 与积极向上的人为伍，建立支持和积极的人际关系。分享积极的经历和观点，与他人共享快乐和成功， 鼓励和激励他人。 注重自己的身心健康，保持良好的生活习惯。合理安排工作和休息时间，参与锻炼、放松和充电的活 动，保持积极的生活态度。
gallup_top5.application_en:
Pay attention to your inner dialogue and turn it into a positive, encouraging voice. Build confidence and self-respect by believing in your abilities and potential.
Approach challenges and difficulties with a positive mindset. Look for ways to solve problems and seize opportunities. Adopt a growth mindset and believe you can overcome obstacles and succeed.
Surround yourself with positive people and build supportive, uplifting relationships. Share positive experiences and perspectives, spread joy and success with others, and encourage and inspire them.
Take care of your physical and mental health and maintain good habits. Balance work and rest, exercise, relax, and recharge so you can keep a positive attitude toward life.
gallup_top5.blind_spots_zh: · 过于积极的人可能忽视现实中的问题和困难，对挑战和障碍持过于乐观的态度，导致缺乏实际的解决方案。 · 有时候，过于强调积极的态度可能导致表面上的积极，而忽视真实的情感和需求，造成内心的不满和不适。 · 积极主题的人可能过于追求成功和进步，过度竞争和自我比较，导致焦虑和不满足感。
gallup_top5.blind_spots_en:
· Being overly positive may cause you to overlook real problems and difficulties, approach challenges with excessive optimism, and fail to develop practical solutions.
· Sometimes emphasizing a positive attitude too strongly can create a surface-level positivity that ignores real emotions and needs, causing inner dissatisfaction and discomfort.
· People with strong Positivity may pursue success and progress so intensely that they become overly competitive and compare themselves too much with others, leading to anxiety and a sense of inadequacy.

tension: 你的 Gallup 主导领域（关系建立）与 Holland 三码中的 S 型高度一致，说明你在相关方向上拥有内外双重能量支撑。 / Your leading Gallup domain (关系建立) aligns strongly with the S type in your Holland code, giving you both internal motivation and natural ability in related directions.

careers.description: 通过面谈或测评帮助来访者理解情绪与行为问题，制定辅导计划并持续跟进。
在中小学或培训机构备课、授课、批改作业，关注学生成长并与家长沟通。
协助业务部门进行招聘、员工关系、绩效沟通与团队建设，支持人才发展。
根据学员体能目标制定训练计划，示范动作、纠正姿势、记录训练数据并预防运动损伤。
通过绘画、音乐或戏剧等艺术活动帮助来访者表达情绪、缓解压力、促进康复。
教授小说、诗歌或剧本写作技巧，批改学员作品并组织读书会或写作工作坊。
在社区策划公共艺术项目、工作坊或文化节，邀请居民参与并促进社区交流。
为企业或学校学员讲授设备操作、软件使用或工艺流程，设计实操练习并考核学习效果。

关于本矩阵的说明 / About This Matrix

本框架是一个辅助你探索兴趣与潜能交集的工具，而非对你下结论的标签。矩阵中的每一格代表一种职业范畴（方向层），是根据 Holland 兴趣舞台与 Gallup 工作方式的理论整合而定义；报告后文的「推荐职业路径」则提供具体岗位线索。请把结果当作对话与行动的起点，通过课程体验、实习、访谈和项目实践来验证。

This matrix is an exploration aid, not a diagnostic label. Each cell represents an occupational domain (direction layer) defined by the integration of Holland interest stage and Gallup working style; specific job suggestions appear later in the career paths section. Use these insights as a starting point for conversation and action; validate them through real experiences, internships, interviews, and projects.

下方矩阵展示了 6 种 RIASEC 兴趣类型与 4 大 CliftonStrengths 优势领域交叉形成的 24 种职业范畴。表格中每格仅标注范畴名称；带色边框的格子与你结果相关——边框越实、颜色越深，关联越强。具体解读见矩阵下方。

B. 主题叙事 | Theme Narrative

说明 / Note：以下主题叙事已提供中英双语对照：中文翻译优先保留本土教练式表达，英文保留 Gallup CliftonStrengths 原有表述风格。每个主题依次列出标准定义、特征、应用建议与盲点。
The theme narratives below are presented in bilingual format: Chinese translations retain a local coaching style, while English preserves the original Gallup CliftonStrengths tone. Each theme includes its standard definition, feature, application tips, and blind spots.

交往 / Relator（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：交往能力强的人喜欢人际间的亲密关系。 他们最大的满足是与朋友一道为实现一个目标而共同努力。
People exceptionally talented in the Relator theme enjoy close relationships with others. They find deep satisfaction in working hard with friends to achieve a goal.

特征 / Feature：交往能力强的人享受亲密的人际关系。他们最大的乐趣是与朋友一起合作，共同实现共同目标。
You enjoy close, intimate relationships. Your greatest pleasure comes from working alongside friends toward a shared goal.

应用 / Application：愿意与他人分享知识和经验，支持他人的成长和发展。 尊重和接纳他人的不同观点、文化和背景。倡导多样性和包容性，并与不同背景的人合作，增进相互理 解和合作。 重视他人的观点和感受。倾听他人的需求和问题，并展现出真正的关心。 培养良好的社交技巧，学会察言观色，适应不同的人际交往风格，以更好地理解和与他人沟通。 培养解决问题的技巧，处理冲突时保持冷静和客观，寻求妥协和解决方案，有效沟通，寻求共同的利益 和理解。
Be willing to share your knowledge and experience with others to support their growth and development. Respect and accept others' different viewpoints, cultures, and backgrounds. Advocate for diversity and inclusion, and work with people from diverse backgrounds to increase mutual understanding and cooperation. Value others' perspectives and feelings. Listen to their needs and problems and show genuine care. Develop good social skills. Learn to read the room and adapt to different interpersonal styles so you can better understand and communicate with others. Build problem-solving skills. Stay calm and objective when handling conflict, seek compromise and solutions, communicate effectively, and look for shared interests and understanding.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 过于坚持己见和固定的交往模式，不愿意适应和调整自己的行为和观念，影响交往的互动性和流畅度。 · 忽视寻找共同的利益点和共同目标，导致交往关系的表面化和短暂性。 · 不尊重他人的个人空间和隐私，过于侵入性的行为和过问，造成他人的不适和疏离。
· You may cling too tightly to your own views and fixed ways of relating, resisting adapting or adjusting your behavior and beliefs, which can make interactions less fluid. · You may neglect to find shared interests and common goals, causing relationships to become superficial and short-lived. · You may fail to respect others' personal space and privacy, behaving intrusively or asking overly personal questions, which can make others uncomfortable and distant.

包容 / Includer（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：包容力强的人善于接纳他人。他们关心那些被忽略的人， 并努力让这些人融入集体。
People exceptionally talented in the Includer theme accept others. They show awareness of those who feel left out and make efforts to include them.

特征 / Feature：包容力强的人是慈善家，他们善于接纳他人，关心被忽视的人，并促使他们融入集体。
You are naturally accepting, caring about those who are overlooked and helping them become part of the group.

应用 / Application：展现对不同背景、观点和经验的尊重和欣赏。认识到每个人都有独特的贡献和价值，倾听并接纳不同意 见和观点。 主动提供支持和帮助他人的机会，展现关心和同理心。愿意倾听他人的需求，并努力为他人提供支持和 协助。 鼓励积极的沟通和反馈，提供安全和开放的环境，让每个人都能表达意见和感受。确保沟通渠道畅通， 包括定期会议、团队讨论和个人反馈。 加强自我意识，了解自己的偏好和偏见，积极反思和调整自己的行为，加强与他人的情感连接和共情能 力。
Show respect and appreciation for different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. Recognize that everyone has unique contributions and value, and listen to and accept differing opinions and views. Actively offer opportunities to support and help others, showing care and empathy. Be willing to listen to others' needs and do your best to provide support and assistance. Encourage positive communication and feedback by providing a safe and open environment where everyone can express opinions and feelings. Make sure communication channels stay open, including regular meetings, team discussions, and personal feedback. Strengthen self-awareness by understanding your own preferences and biases, reflecting actively, and adjusting your behavior to build stronger emotional connections and empathy with others.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 对于不同文化背景、价值观和行为规范的认知不足，缺乏对多元文化的尊重和理解。 · 与同质化的社交圈子保持较高的亲密度，缺乏与多样化背景的人交流和接触的机会。 · 身处不支持包容和多样性的环境，如歧视性言论和行为较多的地方，会对包容主题产生负面影响。
· You may lack knowledge of different cultural backgrounds, values, and behavioral norms, leading to insufficient respect and understanding of diversity. · You may stay closely connected to a homogeneous social circle and miss opportunities to interact with people from diverse backgrounds. · Being in an environment that does not support inclusion and diversity, such as one with frequent discriminatory words or actions, can weaken your Includer theme.

和谐 / Harmony（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“和谐”才干主题突出的人渴求协调一致。 他们避免冲突，寻求共识。
People exceptionally talented in the Harmony theme look for consensus. They don't enjoy conflict; rather, they seek areas of agreement.

特征 / Feature：和谐主题突出的人追求协调与共识，像和平天使一样化解冲突、营造和谐。
You pursue coordination and consensus, resolving conflict and creating harmony like a peacemaker.

应用 / Application：确保与周围人之间有开放、透明和及时的沟通渠道，避免信息不对称和误解，增强合作和和谐。 重视他人的观点和感受，积极倾听他人的想法和建议，展示出真诚的关怀和关心。 鼓励团队成员之间的合作和协作，强调团队的共同目标和利益，共同努力解决问题和实现目标。 处理冲突时采取积极的方法，鼓励开放的对话和理解，寻求妥协和共赢的解决方案，以维护和谐的关 系。
Make sure open, transparent, and timely communication channels exist with the people around you. Avoid information gaps and misunderstandings, and strengthen cooperation and harmony. Value others' perspectives and feelings. Listen actively to their ideas and suggestions and show sincere care and concern. Encourage teamwork and collaboration among team members, emphasizing shared goals and interests so everyone works together to solve problems and achieve objectives. Approach conflict constructively by encouraging open dialogue and understanding, seeking compromise and win-win solutions, and preserving harmonious relationships.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 合理的冲突可以带来创新和改进，过度追求和谐可能忽视了冲突的积极作用。 · 可能导致忽视个人的需求和边界，无法有效地满足自己的利益和利益。 · 压抑自己的情绪和需求，可能使得问题无法得到解决和满足。
· Healthy conflict can drive innovation and improvement; pursuing harmony too strongly may overlook the positive role of conflict. · It may lead you to neglect your own needs and boundaries, making it hard to protect your own interests. · Suppressing your own emotions and needs may prevent problems from being resolved and needs from being met.

关联 / Connectedness（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“关联”才干主题突出的人深信世间万物都彼此关联。 他们相信，世间没有巧合，凡事必有成因。
People exceptionally talented in the Connectedness theme have faith in the links among all things. They believe there are few coincidences and that almost every event has meaning.

特征 / Feature：关联主题突出的人坚信世界万物相互关联，认为一切都有其成因和联系。
You believe that everything in the world is connected and that every event has its cause and purpose.

应用 / Application：努力理解他人的需求、意见和观点，并尝试找到共同利益和解决方案。 与不同部门和团队的人合作，促进跨部门的合作、协调和促进信息共享，保证项目的顺利进行。 积极参与行业内的网络活动和社交场合。与同行、专家和领导者建立联系，通过交流和分享经验来扩大 影响力和资源。 与他人分享自己的知识、经验和资源，帮助他人提升技能和知识水平。
Strive to understand others' needs, opinions, and perspectives, and look for shared interests and solutions. Work with people across departments and teams to promote collaboration, coordination, and information sharing so projects run smoothly. Actively participate in networks and social events. Connect with peers, experts, and leaders to expand your influence and resources through exchange and shared experience. Share your knowledge, experience, and resources with others to help them grow their skills and understanding.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 追求关联而忽视事实和逻辑的支持。将不相关的事物强行关联起来，导致关联的无效性和误导性。 · 忽视潜在的相关性，而未能发现事物之间的关联。这种遗漏可能导致对问题的理解不完整，无法获得全面的 洞察。 · 关联主题往往涉及多个因素和变量，可能过于关注某些因素，而忽视了其他重要的因素。这种偏重可能导致 对问题的解释和预测的不准确性。
· You may pursue connections while neglecting factual and logical support, forcing unrelated things together and producing invalid or misleading links. · You may overlook potential connections and miss relationships between things, leading to incomplete understanding and less comprehensive insight. · Connectedness often involves many factors and variables; you may focus too much on certain factors while ignoring others, reducing the accuracy of your explanations and predictions.

积极 / Positivity（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：积极的人浑身充满了富有感染力的热情。 他们乐观向上，并能感召周围的人。
People exceptionally talented in the Positivity theme have an enthusiasm that is contagious. They are upbeat and can get others excited about what they are going to do.

特征 / Feature：积极的人散发着富有感染力的热情，以快乐和积极向上的态度激励周围的人。
You radiate contagious enthusiasm, inspiring those around you with joy and a positive, forward-looking attitude.

应用 / Application：关注自己内心的对话，并将其转化为积极的、励志的声音。培养自信和自尊，相信自己的能力和潜力。 以积极的心态对待工作中的挑战和困难。寻找解决问题的方法和机会，抱有成长的心态，相信自己能够 克服困难并取得成功。 与积极向上的人为伍，建立支持和积极的人际关系。分享积极的经历和观点，与他人共享快乐和成功， 鼓励和激励他人。 注重自己的身心健康，保持良好的生活习惯。合理安排工作和休息时间，参与锻炼、放松和充电的活 动，保持积极的生活态度。
Pay attention to your inner dialogue and turn it into a positive, encouraging voice. Build confidence and self-respect by believing in your abilities and potential. Approach challenges and difficulties with a positive mindset. Look for ways to solve problems and seize opportunities. Adopt a growth mindset and believe you can overcome obstacles and succeed. Surround yourself with positive people and build supportive, uplifting relationships. Share positive experiences and perspectives, spread joy and success with others, and encourage and inspire them. Take care of your physical and mental health and maintain good habits. Balance work and rest, exercise, relax, and recharge so you can keep a positive attitude toward life.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 过于积极的人可能忽视现实中的问题和困难，对挑战和障碍持过于乐观的态度，导致缺乏实际的解决方案。 · 有时候，过于强调积极的态度可能导致表面上的积极，而忽视真实的情感和需求，造成内心的不满和不适。 · 积极主题的人可能过于追求成功和进步，过度竞争和自我比较，导致焦虑和不满足感。
· Being overly positive may cause you to overlook real problems and difficulties, approach challenges with excessive optimism, and fail to develop practical solutions. · Sometimes emphasizing a positive attitude too strongly can create a surface-level positivity that ignores real emotions and needs, causing inner dissatisfaction and discomfort. · People with strong Positivity may pursue success and progress so intensely that they become overly competitive and compare themselves too much with others, leading to anxiety and a sense of inadequacy.

伯乐 / Developer（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“伯乐”才干主题突出者善于发现并培养他人的潜能。 他们能够察觉任何微小的进步，并从中得到满足感。
People exceptionally talented in the Developer theme recognize and cultivate the potential in others. They spot the signs of each small improvement and derive satisfaction from evidence of progress.

特征 / Feature：欣赏他人潜力并善于发现进步的人，喜悦于细微的成长，激励他人不断进步。
You appreciate others' potential, notice even small improvements, and find joy in every sign of growth as you encourage people to keep progressing.

应用 / Application：观察和评估身边的人，发现他们的优点、才能和潜力，注意他们的成就和特长。 与他人建立良好的沟通和合作关系，了解他们的目标和需求，帮助他们发展他们的潜力，并在实现目标 的过程中提供指导和建议。 通过认可和赞赏，激发他人的动力和自信心。表达对他们的信任，并鼓励他们尝试新的挑战和机会。 通过良好的领导实践和积极的影响力，发展自己的领导能力，成为他人的榜样和引导者。 与他人建立导师关系，分享经验和知识，帮助他们发展专业能力和职业发展。
Observe and evaluate the people around you to discover their strengths, talents, and potential. Notice their achievements and special abilities. Build good communication and working relationships with others. Understand their goals and needs, help them develop their potential, and offer guidance and suggestions as they work toward their objectives. Recognize and praise others to spark their motivation and confidence. Express your trust in them and encourage them to try new challenges and opportunities. Develop your leadership through positive influence and good practices, becoming a role model and guide for others. Build mentoring relationships, sharing experience and knowledge to help others grow professionally.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 依赖他人的赞许和认可，忽视自身的价值和成就，导致自我价值感受受损。 · 过分专注于他人的潜力和成功，忽略了自己的个人成长和发展，可能导致自身进步的缓慢。 · 对他人的成长和进步寄予过高期望，忽视每个人的独特情况和发展速度，可能带来不必要的压力和失望。
· You may rely too much on others' praise and recognition, neglecting your own value and achievements and damaging your self-worth. · You may focus so much on others' potential and success that you ignore your own growth and development, slowing your own progress. · You may hold overly high expectations for others' growth, overlooking each person's unique situation and pace, which can create unnecessary pressure and disappointment.

行动 / Activator（影响力 / Influencing）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“行动”才干主题突出的人善于把想法变成行动。他们渴望立刻行动，而不只是空谈。
People exceptionally talented in the Activator theme can make things happen by turning thoughts into action. They want to do things now, rather than simply talk about them.

特征 / Feature：能够把想法化为行动，让事情发生；他们想做就做，不愿只停留在讨论。
can make things happen by turning thoughts into action. They want to do things now, rather than simply talk about them.

应用 / Application：如果“行动”是你的前五才干之一，你很擅长动员团队行动起来：你清楚地传达需要做什么，并营造紧迫感。你是为组织节省时间、精力和成本的催化剂。当项目停滞不前时，你会推动事情前进。你不害怕冒险，这让你成为一个出色的创新者。你的能量和以行动为导向的方式能带动势头，让事情持续推进。
With Activator in your Top 5, you likely excel at mobilising your team to action — you communicate what has to be done and then instill a sense of urgency. You are a catalyst for saving your organization time, energy and money. You are impatient for action and get things moving when projects stall. You are not afraid to take risks, which can make you a great innovator. Your energy and action-oriented approach instill momentum — you keep things progressing forward.

盲点 / Blind Spots：你可能倾向于在没有具体计划的情况下就冲出去行动。在行动前，先停下来考虑替代方案和可能的后果。 你急于开始，可能会错过别人的重要想法。给团队中的其他人表达意见的机会。 因为你相信只有行动才能带来成果，别人可能会觉得你缺乏条理或冲动。如果你是管理者或团队领导，花时间解释你的思路，并确保大家对期望有清晰的了解。 你启动事情很快，这可能让其他人感到被忽视、不被欣赏或不被重视。花时间倾听别人，确保方向正确。 虽然有时大家都需要在没有周密计划的情况下勇往直前，但在做重大决定前，考虑各种选择并权衡利弊总是一个好习惯。 你催促别人采取行动的力度，可能会让一些人感到不堪重负，被迫在准备好之前行动。拥有较强“行动”才干的人要记住，别人不一定有同样的紧迫感，有些人需要更多时间思考后再行动。 如果“行动”不是你的突出才干，也不意味着你缺乏主动性或激情。你可能只是更喜欢在行动前仔细考虑。当需要立即行动时，尽量在自己熟悉或擅长的领域发挥。找到能帮助你启动事情的其他才干，比如“责任”“信仰”或“包容”，它们也能为你点燃行动的火花。有时你需要给自己设定一个合理的标准，然后立刻去做。
You may have a tendency to charge ahead and act without a concrete plan. Challenge yourself to stop and consider alternatives and consequences before taking action. Your drive to get started means you may miss important ideas from others. Give others on the team a chance to give input. Because you believe only action leads to performance, you may be perceived as unorganised or impulsive. If you are a manager or team leader, take time to explain your reasoning and make sure you are clear about your expectations. You start things quickly and that may cause others to feel left out, unappreciated or undervalued. Take time to listen to others to ensure you are headed in the right direction. There are times everyone needs to charge ahead and act without a solid plan. Before making a major decision, it is always a good practice to consider alternatives and weigh options first. The force of their urging people to take action might make others feel overwhelmed and pressured to act before they are comfortable. People with strong Activator talents should remember that others may not feel that same urgency, and some people will need more time to think before they act. If Activator Is a Lesser Theme for You If you lack the intensity of Activator talents, it does not mean you lack initiative, fire or the ability to get things started. Rather, you might be someone who prefers to consider actions carefully before taking them. Ensure that you are operating in areas of familiarity or expertise if the situation requires immediate action. Know the best way to prepare yourself to take action. Consider the significant decisions you’ve made in your life and determine what steps you went through to feel ready to take action. Did you talk to others first to get their opinions? Did you thoroughly research the topic area? Did you systematically evaluate different scenarios and obstacles? Among your top themes, find those that help you get things started. Responsibility , Belief or Includer talents could provide the spark of initiative for you in the same way Activator talents do for others. Sometimes you might have to set a reasonable standard for yourself and just do it. 体谅 / Empathy（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“体谅”才干主题突出的人能够设身处地地体会他人的 感受。
People exceptionally talented in the Empathy theme can sense the feelings of other people by imagining themselves in others' lives.

特征 / Feature：具备同理心的人是心灵导师，善于感同身受，体察他人情感，以温暖他人心灵。
You are a natural emotional guide, able to put yourself in others' shoes, sense their feelings, and warm their hearts with understanding.

应用 / Application：积极倾听他人的意见和观点，尊重他人的感受和想法，表达出对他人感受的关心和共鸣。 尊重和接纳不同个体的差异，包括文化背景、观念和工作风格等，鼓励多样性和不同声音的表达。 关注他人的困难和挑战，愿意伸出援手并提供实质性的帮助，共同解决问题并实现共同目标。 关注并回应他人的需求。表达对他人的关心和支持，提供合适的帮助和资源，以满足他人的需求，并促 进他人的成长和发展。
Listen actively to others' opinions and perspectives, respect their feelings and ideas, and show genuine care and resonance for what they feel. Respect and accept differences among individuals, including cultural backgrounds, values, and working styles, and encourage diversity and diverse voices. Pay attention to others' difficulties and challenges, be willing to lend a hand, and provide practical help to solve problems together and achieve shared goals. Notice and respond to others' needs. Express care and support, offer appropriate help and resources, and promote others' growth and development.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 过度假设他人的感受可能导致误解和误判，无法真正理解他人的需求和情感。 · 自我牺牲和忽视自己的需求和边界，使自己处于不利的境地。 · 不敢表达自己的意见和需求，忽视了良好的沟通和建立互相理解的机会。
· Assuming too much about how others feel can lead to misunderstanding and misjudgment, preventing you from truly grasping their needs and emotions. · You may sacrifice yourself and neglect your own needs and boundaries, putting yourself at a disadvantage. · You may hesitate to express your own opinions and needs, missing opportunities for good communication and mutual understanding.

回顾 / Context（战略思维 / Strategic Thinking）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：“回顾”才干主题突出的人喜欢追溯从前。 他们通过思考过去来了解现状。
People exceptionally talented in the Context theme enjoy thinking about the past. They understand the present by researching its history.

特征 / Feature：具有回顾主题的人喜欢追溯过去，通过对过去的揣摩来理解现在。
People with strong Context talents enjoy looking back. They understand the present by examining the past.

应用 / Application：定期回顾自己的工作和生活表现，反思过去的经验和成果，了解自己的优点和改进的领域。 识别自己在工作和生活中取得的成功和优势、技能和特长，认识到自己的价值和潜力。 利用回顾的机会来识别自己的学习需求和发展机会，不断提升自己的技能和知识。 根据自己的反思和目标，制定相应的行动计划，并持续跟踪和评估自己的进展。
Regularly review your work and life performance. Reflect on past experiences and results to understand your strengths and areas for improvement. Identify your successes and strengths — your skills and talents — in work and life, recognising your value and potential. Use opportunities to look back to identify your learning needs and development opportunities, continuously improving your skills and knowledge. Based on your reflection and goals, develop corresponding action plans, and continuously track and evaluate your progress.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 苛求自己，对自己的行为和决策持过度批判的态度。这可能导致自我评价过低和自责心理的产生。 · 关注过去的错误和失败，而忽视了自身的成长和进步。他们可能无法看到自己取得的进步和积极变化。 · 回顾自己的过程中缺乏客观观察，过分依赖主观的情绪和偏见。这可能影响对自身行为的准确评估和深入理 解。
You may be overly critical of yourself and your behaviours and decisions. This can lead to low self-evaluation and feelings of guilt. You may focus on past mistakes and failures while overlooking your growth and progress. You may be unable to see the progress and positive changes you have made. In the process of reflection, you may lack objective observation and rely too much on subjective emotions and biases. This can affect the accurate assessment and deeper understanding of your own behaviour.

适应 / Adaptability（关系建立 / Relationship Building）

标准定义 / Standard Definition：适应力强的人倾向于“随大流”。他们活在“当前”， 接受现实，随遇而安。
People exceptionally talented in the Adaptability theme prefer to go with the flow. They tend to be "now" people who take things as they come and discover the future one choice at a time.

特征 / Feature：适应性强的人倾向于顺应潮流，他们活在当下，接受现实，随遇而安。
You readily go with the flow, live in the present moment, accept reality as it is, and adjust naturally to whatever comes your way.

应用 / Application：积极面对变化并适应新的情况 ,培养灵活性和应变能力，学会适应不断变化的工作环境和生活需求。 寻求灵活的工作安排，如弹性工作时间或远程办公，以更好地适应个人需求和工作要求。 与不同背景和经验的人合作，开阔自己的视野，学会从多个角度看待问题，以更好地适应多样化的工作 环境。
Embrace change and adapt actively to new situations. Cultivate flexibility and resilience so you can respond to evolving work environments and life demands. Seek flexible arrangements such as adjustable schedules or remote options that let you match your personal needs with changing responsibilities. Collaborate with people from diverse backgrounds and experiences to broaden your perspective and learn to see situations from multiple angles.

盲点 / Blind Spots：· 过于顺应他人和环境的期待，而忽视了自己真实的需求和价值观。 · 太重视与他人的和谐相处，而忽视了自己的个人成长和发展的重要性。 · 对变化和不确定性感到不适应，导致焦虑和固执于既定的方式和习惯。
· You may follow others' and the environment's expectations too closely, neglecting your true needs and values. · You may prioritize harmony with others so much that you overlook your own growth and development. · You may feel uneasy about change and uncertainty, leading to anxiety and stubborn attachment to established ways and habits.

主导领域分析 / Leading Domain Analysis：Top 10 中 关系建立 / Relationship Building 领域占 8 项，说明该生在行动方式上偏向 关系连接型 / Relationship Builder。

In your Top 10, Relationship Building accounts for 8 themes, indicating a natural tendency toward Relationship Builder.
